name: Josera Salmon and Potato 12.5kg
shortDescription: A grain-free pleasure for our chowhounds: Salmon and potato, with herbs and fruits. Due to the low protein and energy content and the moderate mineral content, it is also highly suitable for older dogs. A great product for dogs with allergies to Grains or to other sources of meat besides Salmon. Greatly helps dogs with skin allergies.
description: JOSERA Nature Senior . This grain-free recipe combines the irresistible taste of salmon (19%) with wholesome potato (51%) , herbs, and fruits to provide a complete and balanced diet. With reduced protein and energy content and a moderate mineral level, it’s perfectly tailored for older dogs or dogs with lower activity levels. Premium Ingredients Salmon (19.0%), dried potato (51.0%), poultry fat, beet fiber, potato protein, carob meal, hydrolysed fish protein, minerals, chicory root (natural source of inulin), herbs, fruits. Complete & Balanced Nutrition Supports: . Healthy joints and mobility . Shiny coat and healthy skin . Gentle digestion and nutrient absorption . Vitality in later life Why It’s Ideal for Senior Dogs Single Animal Protein Source – 19% dried salmon (equivalent to 65g fresh salmon per 100g kibble) supports lean muscles while being gentle on digestion. Grain-Free Formula – ideal for sensitive dogs or those prone to grain intolerance. Natural Herbs & Fruits Blend – including carob, chicory root (a natural prebiotic), raspberries, peppermint, parsley, chamomile, rosehip, liquorice root, and chokeberry for vitality and wellness. Balanced Energy for Aging Dogs – lower protein and fat levels support healthy weight maintenance. Moderate Mineral Content – helps reduce strain on kidneys and supports senior dogs’ needs.
